notes: BrickLink Part Out Value (PR #446): authoritative POV (BL's own 6-month sold + current-listing averages) via one CDP page navigation - zero BL API budget. Migration 20260616090152 added bricklink_part_out_value_cache (generated partout_multiple = sold_6mo_avg_gbp / NULLIF(uk_retail_gbp,0), RLS, unique on 8-col option-variant) + bricklink_pov_config (editable defaults, set to 20s delay + 0.74 USD rate). Engine part-out-value.ts (PovScraper CDP navigation - logged-in GBP / logged-out incognito USD; typed Login/Captcha/NotFound/Empty errors; socket-close handler + per-call timeout) and part-out-value-cache.service.ts (cache + UK RRP from brickset_sets + shared getPovForSet = Vinted extension point). CLI pov-fetch.ts (cache-first) + pov-backfill.ts (newest-first, skip-fresh, conservative jittered pacing + cooldown-every-25, stop-on-anti-bot, logged-out-needs-USD-rate guard). Web: GET/POST /api/bricklink/part-out-value (+/config), OfficialPovCard atop set-lookup Partout tab (graceful cache-only when CDP unreachable off-box). Skill /bl-part-out-value. Two multi-agent review workflows: first found + fixed a MEDIUM parser section-bleed (no-sales sets), re-verify GO. POC seeded ~100 newest RRP sets (logged-in/GBP): 104 cache rows, 101 multiples (avg 1.74x, max 3.23x Ferrari SF90). IMPORTANT: bulk backfill is local-only (needs CDP Chrome on :9222) - run with the dedicated BL account (domham91) behind a VPN, logged-in. Web Fetch button live-scrapes only on the local dev server; prod is cache-read + graceful degrade. previousCommit 52c28110 (PR #441) for rollback.
